## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] Other:

## Agent Help

AI coding agents are welcome. If one helped, a short note can make review easier.

Agent/tool used, if useful to mention:

Anything reviewers should know about generated code or review:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not modify unrelated files.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior, setup, or privacy expectations change.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] The diff does not include secrets, personal data, signing details, private URLs, or local paths.
- [ ] The diff does not include agent transcripts, scratch files, hidden metadata, or generated logs unless intentional.
- [ ] Any agent-generated code has been read and checked by the contributor.
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary, actively maintained, and license-compatible.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out risks, tradeoffs, or follow-up work.
